milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17c.a — Destructive-color cascade. Migrated all four destructive-action buttons to the --danger-* token family introduced in M9.17c: .learn-action-btn-danger (was #c0392b brick), .project-delete (was #f43f5e rose), .storage-key-delete (was mixed #f87171/#f43f5e), .pin-picker-remove (was mixed #f87171/#f43f5e). All four now share the same red hue; future hue retuning is a one-line :root edit. Remaining reds in style.css are sentiment pills / error-state indicators / severity dots — out of scope per the rule (red = severity, not action).
